stemHtml: When a pilot is being vectored, he/she may occasionally be instructed to make a complete turn for delaying purposes or to achieve a required spacing behind preceding traffic. Which of the following communications can be heard in such a situation?

options.a: “F-GO, MAKE A COMPLETE TURN LEFT FOR AVOIDING TRAFFIC.” “COMPLETE TURN LEFT, F-GO.”
options.b: “F-GO, ROTATE LEFT FOR DELAY." “ROTATING LEFT F-GO.”
options.c: “F-GO, THREE HUNDRED SIX ZERO LEFT ON DOWNWIND.” “THREE HUNDREDSIX ZEROLEFT, F-GO.”
options.d: “F-GO, MAKE A THREE SIXTY TURN LEFT FOR SEQUENCING.” “THREE SIXTY TURN LEFT, F-GO.”
